title: ophrys × arachnitiformis var. occidentalis
intro: Ophrys × arachnitiformis var. occidentalis is a rare, hybrid orchid plant known as the western spider orchid, resulting from the cross between Ophrys arachnitiformis and possibly other species within the genus Ophrys. The medicinal properties of Ophrys × arachnitiformis var. occidentalis include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, although more research is required to confirm these properties. Some reported health benefits of this plant include its possible use in treating respiratory issues and skin conditions, although these benefits are largely anecdotal and require scientific validation. Herbal preparations of the western spider orchid, such as tinctures or infusions, have been used traditionally in folk medicine, but their efficacy and safety have not been extensively studied.
